name: Servcorp Limited
analysis: SRV has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 14% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$6.8900, stop A$6.4251, target A$7.8296 (2.02:1) — then trail it.
